topPlaces.name: Nilambur
topPlaces.description: Nilambur (Malayalam: [n̪ilɐmbuːr]) is a major town, a municipality and a Taluk in the Malappuram district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is located close to the Nilgiris range of the Western Ghats on the banks of the Chaliyar River.

topPlaces.name: Nilambur–Shoranur line
topPlaces.description: The Nilambur–Shoranur line is a 66 kilometres (41 mi)-long single-line, electrified broad-gauge (1676 mm) railway spur branch line of the Indian Railways connecting Nilambur Road railway station in Malappuram district with Shoranur Junction in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala. It is a branch line administered by the Palakkad railway division of the Southern Railway zone and one of the shortest broad-gauge railway lines in India.

topPlaces.name: Teak Museum
topPlaces.description: Teak Museum is located 6 km from Nilambur, a town in the Malappuram district of Kerala, South India. Teak occurs naturally in India with the main teak forests found in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Eranhimangad
topPlaces.description: Eranhimangad is a village near Chaliyar Grama Panchayath, in Nilambur municipality, Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Karimpuzha (Malappuram)
topPlaces.description: Karimpuzha is the largest tributary of Chaliyar river, Kerala, India. It is very near to Nilambur.

topPlaces.name: Akampadam
topPlaces.description: Akampadam is a town in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India. A parish in the town is Saint Mary Orthodox Church, Akampadam under the Diocese of Malabar of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church.

topPlaces.name: Elambilakode
topPlaces.description: Elambilakode is a hamlet in Chaliyar Panchayath of Nilambur Taluk in Malappuram district, Kerala, South India.

topPlaces.name: Karulai
topPlaces.description: Karulai is a small town and panchayath in Nilambur Taluk of Malappuram district. It is situated on the banks of the Karimpuzha River.

items.note: Nilambur (Malayalam: [n̪ilɐmbuːr]) is a major town, a municipality and a Taluk in the Malappuram district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is located close to the Nilgiris range of the Western Ghats on the banks of the Chaliyar River.

The Nilambur–Shoranur line is a 66 kilometres (41 mi)-long single-line, electrified broad-gauge (1676 mm) railway spur branch line of the Indian Railways connecting Nilambur Road railway station in Malappuram district with Shoranur Junction in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala. It is a branch line administered by the Palakkad railway division of the Southern Railway zone and one of the shortest broad-gauge railway lines in India.
Teak Museum is located 6 km from Nilambur, a town in the Malappuram district of Kerala, South India. Teak occurs naturally in India with the main teak forests found in Kerala.
Eranhimangad is a village near Chaliyar Grama Panchayath, in Nilambur municipality, Kerala state, India.
Karimpuzha is the largest tributary of Chaliyar river, Kerala, India. It is very near to Nilambur.

Akampadam is a town in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India. A parish in the town is Saint Mary Orthodox Church, Akampadam under the Diocese of Malabar of the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church.
Elambilakode is a hamlet in Chaliyar Panchayath of Nilambur Taluk in Malappuram district, Kerala, South India.
Karulai is a small town and panchayath in Nilambur Taluk of Malappuram district. It is situated on the banks of the Karimpuzha River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Little Flower Forane Church, Nilambur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Little Flower Forane Church, Nilambur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Little Flower Forane Church, Nilambur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (86 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Little Flower Forane Church, Nilambur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Little Flower Forane Church, Nilambur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Little Flower Forane Church, Nilambur?
faq.a: Stays in Little Flower Forane Church, Nilambur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Little Flower Forane Church, Nilambur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nilambur, Nilambur–Shoranur line, Teak Museum, Eranhimangad, Karimpuzha (Malappuram).
